Phone to Phone

Generate a QR code containing your session data. The other phone scans it and imports the readings — no wifi, no signal needed.

⚠ QR codes hold ~2800 chars. For large datasets use the CSV export and transfer via AirDrop, Bluetooth Files, or share the HTML file itself to carry all stored data.

Import from QR

Paste the data string from a scanned QR code here to import readings into this device.
